error_signature: only takes me to a unique page
title: Dynamic page navigation not working correctly
symptom: When clicking on any project, the application only navigates to a single project detail page instead of the selected project's details.
applies_when: Using dynamic pages for project details
Preserve on navigation toggle is activated
not_this_if: The navigation works correctly for other types of pages
root_cause: The 'Preserve on navigation' toggle, when activated, prevents the dynamic page from updating its content based on the selected project ID, causing it to always display the same project details.
fix_steps: Test the navigation again by clicking on different projects
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Preserve on navigation' toggle in the collection settings for project details.
